name: Upgrade: Landing 1
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Landing Pad from common cushions and miscellaneous parts.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: Reveal a bit more of the map around your landing point, and increase the warpcloak invisibility grace period at the start of each expedition to 70 seconds.

effect.u_message:
Somehow, you understand the statue is calling out for something that can strengthen its power.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

EFFECT: Reveal a bit more of the map around your landing point, and increase the warpcloak invisibility grace period at the start of each expedition to 70 seconds.
Your focus tightens.  Landing points will reveal more of the map, and your warpcloak will last 70 seconds at the beginning of every expedition.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact will empower the island and unlock a permanent upgrade for all future runs.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED UPGRADE: Landing 1

name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Waterwalking
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft a Cloaking Buoyancy from things from water and things that float.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.

effect.u_message:
Somehow, you understand the statue is calling out for something that can strengthen its power.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.
You feel the warp ripple around you.  While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can walk on water.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact will empower the island and unlock a permanent upgrade for all future runs.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED UPGRADE: Landing Boost: Waterwalking.

name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Flight
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft an Inverted Gravity Bubble from things that used to fly and things that could make someone fly.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can fly.

name: Upgrade: Landing Boost: Phasing
description:
Completing this mission will unlock a permanent upgrade for all future expeditions.

Craft the Universal Access Pass from different tools granting access to restricted areas.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

EFFECT: While under the effect of the warpcloak, you can pass through non-thick walls.
